command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Did Sakura receive the message? (gateway.log last 10) ==="
tail -10 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log

echo ""
echo "=== getUpdates via Sakura's token to see ALL recent group messages with from.id ==="
# Use offset=-1 to grab most recent update
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getUpdates?limit=10&allowed_updates=["message"]' | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if d.get('ok'):
    for u in d.get('result',[]):
        msg=u.get('message',{})
        frm=msg.get('from',{})
        sc=msg.get('sender_chat',{})
        via=msg.get('via_bot',{})
        text=msg.get('text','')[:80]
        date=msg.get('date','')
        print(f\"  update={u.get('update_id')} from_id={frm.get('id','?')} @{frm.get('username','?')} bot={frm.get('is_bot')} sender_chat={sc.get('id','-')} via_bot=@{via.get('username','-')} text='{text}'\")
else:
    print('error:', d.get('description'))
    print('note: webhook mode means getUpdates returns nothing - this is expected')
"
REMOTE
